name: Event Marketing Planner
description: Event Marketing Planner - Marketing template for content professionals
instructions: HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE Step 1: Map Your Event Portfolio Start with the Event Portfolio tab. List all events for the year — conferences, webinars, workshops, trade shows, networking events. This gives you a bird's-eye view of your event calendar. Step 2: Create Event Briefs For each major event, create a detailed brief in the Event Brief tab. Define objectives, target audience, key messages, format, and success metrics before committing budget. Step 3: Set Your Budget Use the Budget Tracker to allocate and track costs across categories: venue, catering, speakers, technology, promotion, staffi
